meanings.definition: a verbal act of renouncing a claim or right or position etc.
the act of giving up and abandoning a struggle or task etc.
part with a possession or right
examples: I am relinquishing my bedroom to the long-term house guest
resign a claim to the throne

meanings.definition: do without or cease to hold or adhere to

examples: Let go of the door handle, please!
relinquish your grip on the rope--you won't fall
